LanguageData.RimChat_CloudProvidersDesc: Use cloud API services like OpenAI, DeepSeek, etc. If output text is truncated, it may be an AI provider issue.
LanguageData.RimChat_LocalProviderDesc: Use locally running models like Player2
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageHint: This setting injects a language requirement into prompts. JSON field names and action IDs stay unchanged.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageTooltip: Function: define response language requirements. Scope: prompt constraints for both diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageFollowSystemToolti: Function: use current game language as prompt language rule. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_OutputLanguageCustomTooltip: Function: use custom language label as prompt language rule. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_APIVersionButtonTooltip: Function: open version notes for the current language. Scope: settings-only utility.
LanguageData.RimChat_DiplomacyVersionTooltip: Function: open version notes language picker. Scope: diplomacy dialogue title bar only.
LanguageData.RimChat_APIGitHubButtonTooltip: Function: open RimChat GitHub repository. Scope: external browser navigation.
LanguageData.RimChat_CloudApiConfigurationsDesc: Configure multiple API providers, the system will try to use available configs in order
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiProviderFieldTooltip: Function: select API provider for this row. Scope: routing of requests sent by the current API config row.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiKeyFieldTooltip: Function: provide provider key/token. Scope: current API config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_ApiModelFieldTooltip: Function: choose or enter target model. Scope: current API config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_BaseUrlFieldTooltip: Function: set custom-compatible endpoint URL. Scope: current custom-provider config row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_CustomUrlModeFieldTooltip: Function: choose how Custom URL is interpreted. Base URL mode auto-completes known chat endpoints; Full Endpoint mode sends requests to the URL as-is.
LanguageData.RimChat_UISettingsTooltip: Function: configure comms-console replacement and typewriter UX. Scope: RimChat interface presentation layer.
LanguageData.RimChat_ReplaceCommsConsoleDesc: Replace the vanilla comms console with diplomacy console, enabling AI dialogue features
LanguageData.RimChat_CommsToggleIconTooltip: Function: quick-toggle comms replacement from map controls. Current: {0}. Scope: map UI icon row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_TokenStatsToggleIconTooltip: Function: quick-toggle API token stats observability window from map controls. Current: {0}. Scope: map UI icon row only.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedFastDesc: Fast mode: 0.02s/char, English letters faster. For quick plot skipping.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedStandardDesc: Standard mode: 0.05s/char, English letters faster. Comfortable reading speed.
LanguageData.RimChat_SpeedImmersiveDesc: Immersive mode: 0.11s/char, English letters faster. For savoring dialogues.
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceSettingsTooltip: Function: configure faction online/offline schedule model. Scope: diplomacy dialogue availability decisions.
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceCacheHours: Presence cache duration after closing window (hours): {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_PresenceForcedOfflineHours: Offline duration slider (kept for UI; does not affect go_offline/set_dnd forced duration): {0}
LanguageData.RimChat_NpcPushSettingsTooltip: Function: configure NPC proactive message behavior. Scope: diplomacy and PawnRPG proactive dialogue scheduling, with separate channel toggles.
LanguageData.RimChat_NpcGlobalMaxMessagesPerWindow: Sliding window limit: max {1} messages within {0} hours
LanguageData.RimChat_EnableBusyByHostiles: Busy check: hostile pawns on map
LanguageData.RimChat_EnableNpcPushThrottleDebugLog: Enable NPC push throttle debug log
LanguageData.RimChat_NpcPush_DebugTriggerFailed: Trigger failed: load a running save and ensure valid factions with AI configuration exist.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgPush_DebugTriggerFailed: Trigger failed: ensure an eligible initiator pawn and a qualified receiver relation are available.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistNeedGame: Load a save to edit PawnRPG proactive protagonists.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistEmpty: No protagonists configured. PawnRPG proactive dialogue is disabled.
LanguageData.RimChat_PawnRpgProtagonistNoCandidates: No player-faction pawns are available to add.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCircleSettingsTooltip: Function: configure social-circle news cadence and auto-actions. Scope: world-news generation and display flow.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateSuccess: Queued one social-circle world-news generation request.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailed: Failed to queue social-circle news generation: unknown error.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedDisable: Failed to queue: social circle system is disabled.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedAiUnava: Failed to queue: AI service is not configured or unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedQueueFu: Failed to queue: request queue is full. Please wait for pending requests to complete.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateFailedNoSeed: Failed to queue: no available events to generate news from. Wait for more world events to occur.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateDisabledHint: The social circle is disabled, so force-generate is unavailable.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateGameHint: Force-generate is available only after loading a save.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialForceGenerateHint: This button is always visible. It queues one fact-based world-news generation request and reschedules the next automatic scan.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityPoorConnectionAdvice: Connection quality looks poor. Consider switching to another provider.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_AUTH_INVALID_1: Check API key/token and remove extra spaces.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_AUTH_INVALID_2: Verify provider auth mode matches server expectations.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Check Base URL and endpoint mode settings.
Confirm server exposes /models and chat endpoints.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_MODEL_NOT_FOUND_1: Pick a model that exists on the current endpoint.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_MODEL_NOT_FOUND_2: Refresh model list and re-select the model.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_TIMEOUT_1: Retry later or reduce server load/context length.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_TIMEOUT_2: Check network quality and service responsiveness.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_RATE_LIMIT_1: Wait before retrying or lower request frequency.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_RATE_LIMIT_2: Use a plan or key with higher quota if available.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_TLS_OR_CERT_1: Check HTTPS certificate validity and local trust chain.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_TLS_OR_CERT_2: Disable SSL interception/proxy rewriting for this endpoint.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_DNS_OR_NETWORK_1: Check DNS/proxy settings and outbound network access.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_DNS_OR_NETWORK_2: Verify endpoint host can be resolved from this machine.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_RESPONSE_SCHEMA_IN: Check provider compatibility and response schema mode.
Ensure server returns expected OpenAI/Ollama fields.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_LOCAL_SERVICE_DOWN: Start local model service and verify listening port.
Check firewall and localhost access policy.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_UNKNOWN_1: Open Log Observability and inspect latest diagnostics.
LanguageData.RimChat_UsabilityHint_UNKNOWN_2: Re-check API settings and run test again.
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_401_Wrong: API key is incorrect or expired
Re-fetch a valid key from the provider console
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_401_Expir: Renew or generate a new key on the provider website
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_401_Forma: Check for extra whitespace or characters at the start/end
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_401_Permi: Ensure the key has permission to call the target model
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_403_Forbi: Check account status and service availability
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_403_Quota: Wait for quota reset or upgrade your plan
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_403_Regio: Check if the provider restricts access from your region
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_AuthInvalid_403_Other: Consult provider documentation or contact support
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_EndpointNotFound_Cust: Check Base URL format and remove trailing slashes
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_EndpointNotFound_Prov: Clear Base URL to use default value, or verify current address on provider site
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_EndpointNotFound_Path: Ensure URL contains the full v1 path
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_EndpointNotFound_Prov: Check provider status page for service availability
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_EndpointNotFound_Loca: Start Ollama or local API service
Verify local service port matches configuration
Allow local service port in firewall inbound rules
Use localhost instead of IP address
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ModelNotFound_WrongNa: Copy the exact model name from available models list
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ModelNotFound_NotDepl: Deploy the model to current API endpoint in provider console
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ModelNotFound_Quota_S: Model exceeds current plan limit; upgrade or wait for reset
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ModelNotFound_Region_: Some models are only available in specific regions
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_Network_Solut: Check network quality; try switching network environment
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_Firewall_Solu: Check firewall settings; ensure outbound HTTPS rules exist
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_Proxy_Solutio: Check proxy settings or temporarily disable proxy
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_LocalModel_So: Use a smaller model or increase hardware resources
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_LocalMemory_S: Close other programs to free memory
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Timeout_LocalGPU_Solu: Wait for GPU to finish current task or use CPU inference
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_RateLimit_TooMany_Sol: Reduce request frequency; wait before retry
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_RateLimit_Plan_Soluti: Upgrade to a plan with higher QPS limit
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_RateLimit_Burst_Solut: Spread out requests to avoid bursts, or request higher burst limits
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_RateLimit_Retry_Solut: Wait according to Retry-After header before retrying
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_TlsCert_Expired_Solut: Server needs to update SSL certificate
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_TlsCert_SelfSigned_So: Use a certificate signed by a trusted CA
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_TlsCert_Mismatch_Solu: Ensure URL matches the domain bound to certificate
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_TlsCert_CA_Solution: Update system root certificates or add custom CA
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_Firewall_S: Check local and enterprise firewall rules
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_ISP_Soluti: Try switching network or using VPN
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_LocalNotRu: Confirm Ollama or API service is running
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_LocalAddre: Confirm using correct local address (localhost or 127.0.0.1)
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_LocalFirew: Allow local service port through firewall
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_DnsNetwork_LocalNetwo: Check network sharing and ping connectivity
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ResponseSchema_ModelC: Wait for provider fix or switch model version
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_ResponseSchema_Provid: Check provider status page; wait for recovery
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_LocalServiceDown_NotS: Start Ollama.exe or local API service
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_LocalServiceDown_Mode: Run ollama pull or ollama run to preload model
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_HttpError_Sol: Look up the corresponding cause for the HTTP status code
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_ServerError_S: Likely a provider issue; wait and retry
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_Network_Solut: Check network settings and connection status
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_Other_Solutio: Open Log Observability window to view detailed error info
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_NoResponse_So: Confirm server is running and network is reachable
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_ConnectionFai: Check address, port, and network connectivity
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_Timeout_Solut: Network slow or server load high; retry later
LanguageData.RimChat_Suggestion_Unknown_Firewall_Solu: Check firewall and security software settings

LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_API_Tooltip: Function: configure providers, API keys, and output language. Scope: all diplomacy and pawn dialogue requests.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_ModOptions_Tooltip: Function: configure global RimChat behavior modules. Scope: AI behavior, presence, social circle, and safety controls.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_PromptWorkbench_Tooltip: Function: edit native Prompt Workbench. Scope: diplomacy/RPG section navigation, preset management, preview, and variable insertion.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_DiplomacyDialogue_Tooltip: Function: configure diplomacy prompt pipeline. Scope: faction diplomacy channel system-prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_PawnDialogue_Tooltip: Function: configure pawn dialogue prompt pipeline. Scope: pawn RPG channel system-prompt assembly.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_RimTalk_Tooltip: Function: inspect bridge availability, shared variables, and summary/persona bridge settings. Scope: RimTalk and MemoryPatch integration only.
LanguageData.RimChat_Tab_ImageApi_Tooltip: Function: configure standalone diplomacy image generation endpoint and prompt templates. Scope: send_image action only.

LanguageData.RimChat_CustomVariableSuggestedDescripti: Safely overrides the prompt-exported pawn personality text.
Appends extra personality flavor after the effective pawn personality.
Describes the faction-specific tone to inject into prompts.
Describes the faction's current attitude toward the player.
Describes how the current pawn should phrase responses.
Describes relationship flavor or emotional distance for dialogue tone.

LanguageData.RimChat_FieldVocabularyDesc: Describes wording habits and signature vocabulary.
LanguageData.RimChat_GlobalDialoguePromptSectionToolt: Function: edit diplomacy dialogue body template. Scope: diplomacy dialogue-layer prompt text.

LanguageData.RimChat_PromptPolicyResetOnUpgradeLabel: Reset prompt custom overrides on schema upgrade
LanguageData.RimChat_PromptPolicyTrimPriorityLabel: Global trim priority node ids (one per line)
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCirclePromptFlow: Editing flow: 1) Update the social-circle action rule template; 2) tune the world-news style / JSON contract / fact template; 3) update publish_public_post action metadata; 4) click Save Prompt in the left panel.
LanguageData.RimChat_SocialCirclePromptPersistenceHin: Defaults come from Prompt/Default/SocialCirclePrompt_Default.json; edits are saved to Prompt/Custom/SocialCirclePrompt_Custom.json.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_FallbackTemplates_Too: Function: edit RPG fallback templates. Scope: degraded-format and recovery prompt paths.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_ApiPromptTemplates_To: Function: edit RPG API action templates. Scope: action guidance segment in pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGRoleSettingTooltip: Function: define baseline persona and behavioral foundation. Scope: role-setting segment in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGDialogueStyleTooltip: Function: define visible dialogue tone and writing style. Scope: visible-text generation segment in pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGFormatConstraintTooltip: Function: define output format and JSON contract. Scope: action parsing stage in pawn dialogue.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectSelfStatusTooltip: Function: inject current NPC self status. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectInterlocutorStatusToolt: Function: inject interlocutor (player side) state. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectFactionBackground: Faction Background: relationship and ideology context
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGInjectFactionBackgroundToolti: Function: inject faction relation and ideology context. Scope: dynamic injection block in pawn dialogue system prompt.
LanguageData.RimChat_EnableRPGNonVerbalPawnSpeechTool: Function: force non-verbal target replies into sound + inner-thought format. Scope: visible NPC reply formatting and RPG request-time constraint injection.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGNonVerbalFallbackThought: its instincts pulse in fragmented signals
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_RoleSetting_Tooltip: Function: edit RPG role-setting template. Scope: role-setting segment in pawn dialogue system prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_DialogueStyle_Tooltip: Function: edit RPG dialogue-style template. Scope: visible dialogue style segment in pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_DynamicInjection_Tool: Function: configure RPG dynamic injection switches. Scope: runtime context injection layer for pawn dialogue prompts.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_PawnPersonaPrompts_To: Function: edit per-pawn persona overrides. Scope: extra system prompt block when that pawn is the RPG target.
LanguageData.RimChat_RPGSection_FormatConstraint_Tool: Function: edit RPG output constraints. Scope: action JSON protocol constraints in pawn dialogue.

LanguageData.RimChat_PromptWorkbench_QuickPawnTooltip: Function: create or update a pawn-specific prompt rule from player colonists, tamed animals, and mechs in the current save. Scope: fixed variable `system.custom.quick_pawn_persona`.
